title: Operations Rail Ledger
concept: A light technical Playground console with a left operational rail, persistent live WordPress preview, operations ledger, and event stream where create, save, rename, delete, import, and export actions mutate the same active Playground object.
flows: Import a ZIP archive end to end with source selection, invalid-file failure, validation, replacement warning, progress, success state, and active Playground identity update
Export the active Playground to GitHub or download a ZIP with destination state, progress, generated result, and transfer history
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct progress and consequences
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, rename, delete confirmation, row removal, and active-site fallback
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, and additional transfer actions while the live WordPress preview remains visible
featureCoverage: Import zip trigger and complete replacement flow
Blueprint gallery with current categories, search, and honest representative subset label
Local directory save with permission consequence
Delete saved Playground with confirmation and fallback
WordPress, PHP, language, network, older versions, and multisite settings
Destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with new file, new folder, upload, browse, editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor with copy, download, run, validation, and replacement warning
Database driver, SQLite path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic warning state
Transfer history for ZIP, GitHub, Blueprint, and database actions
